LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Black_Blood_Sausage.description: Cook black blood sausage from wasteland meat and blood.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Black_Blood_Sausage.label: cook black blood sausage
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Brahmin_Pot_Pie.description: Cook a hearty brahmin pot pie with prime beast meat, tatos, and razorgrain.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Brahmin_Pot_Pie.label: cook brahmin pot pie
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Bug_Mush.description: Grind insects into a protein-rich mush.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Bug_Mush.label: cook bug mush
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Chicken_Noodle_Cup.description: Cook a simple chicken noodle cup with poultry and razorgrain noodles.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Chicken_Noodle_Cup.label: cook chicken noodle cup
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Cook_Cooks_Fiend_Stew.descripti: Cook a spicy, aggressive stew with whatever meat is available and plenty of jalapeÃ±os.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Cook_Cooks_Fiend_Stew.label: cook cook-cook's fiend stew
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Crispy_Wings.description: Deep-fry rad chicken wings until crispy and golden.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Crispy_Wings.label: cook crispy wings
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Deathclaw_Steak_And_Eggs.descri: Prepare a premium meal of deathclaw steak with fresh eggs.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Deathclaw_Steak_And_Eggs.label: cook deathclaw steak and eggs
Prepare deathclaw steak served with razorgrain.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Flea_Soup.description: Boil a thin broth from small creatures and scraps.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Flea_Soup.label: cook flea soup
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Meat_On_A_Stick.description: Grill simple meat skewers over an open flame.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Meat_On_A_Stick.label: cook meat on a stick
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Noodle_Cup.description: Prepare a basic cup of razorgrain noodles.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Noodle_Cup.label: cook noodle cup
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Prime_Meat_Steak.description: Prepare a well-cooked steak from prime wasteland beast meat.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Prime_Meat_Steak.label: cook prime meat steak
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Prime_Meat_Steak_With_Corn_And_: Prepare a lavish meal of prime steak with grilled maize and roasted tatos.
Cooking prime steak with corn and tatos.
cook prime meat steak with corn and tatos
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Sausages.description: Grill simple sausages from ground wasteland meat.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Sausages.label: cook sausages
